competitors.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro Review — 1M Context Window, Coding & Pricing
key_points: Thinking mode delivers real gains — noticeably better reasoning on complex coding and math tasks
1M token context window is genuinely useful — processing entire codebases in single prompts
Coding quality rivals Claude Opus but responses come faster — combination of thinking mode and speed
Free tier through Google AI Studio is generous, but API pricing has caveats — thinking tokens are invisible yet billed
Gemini 2.5 Pro offers largest context window among frontier models: 1M tokens vs Claude 200K, GPT-4o 128K
Native thinking mode built-in (not a separate model) — every prompt benefits from reasoning when needed
API pricing 12x cheaper than Claude Opus on input: $1.25 vs $15 per million tokens

stats.fact: Gemini 2.5 Pro API pricing: $1.25 per million input tokens, $10 per million output tokens (standard <200K context)
Long context pricing (>200K tokens): $2.50/$15 per million input/output tokens
Batch API pricing: $0.625/$5 per million input/output tokens — 50% discount for async workloads
Google One AI Premium: $19.99/month includes unlimited Gemini Advanced + 2TB Google storage
Gemini 2.5 Pro scores 62.4% on SimpleBench benchmark (Apr 2026)
1 million token context window — largest among frontier models (5x Claude Opus, 8x GPT-4o)
Chatbot Arena #1 ranking across all categories in 2025-2026
AIME 2025 math benchmark score: 86.7% with thinking mode
Thinking tokens billed invisibly as output tokens — can inflate costs by 2-8x on reasoning tasks
